# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [0.1.3] - 2026-04-04

### Features

- Add SIMD-accelerated FASTQ parsing via fgumi-simd-fastq crate ([#180](https://github.com/fulcrumgenomics/fgumi/pull/180))

### Refactor

- Replace all unwrap() calls in crates/ with expect() ([#225](https://github.com/fulcrumgenomics/fgumi/pull/225))
